top_signals.title: Fahmi Quadir on Why She’s Going Long on Korea
top_signals.summary:
Founder and CIO of Safkhet Capital, Fahmi Quadir, earned the nickname "the Assassin" by short-selling Wirecard AG and Valeant.

On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Quadir tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway  about her role in the current "golden age of fraud" and why, for the first time ever, she is going long with a focus on Korea that has nothing to do with the AI boom.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
